Package neqsim.process.operations.envelope

Class OperationalEnvelopeReport

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.envelope.OperationalEnvelopeReport
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class OperationalEnvelopeReport extends Object implements Serializable
Report from an operational envelope evaluation.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • OperationalEnvelopeReport

      public OperationalEnvelopeReport(long timestampMillis, double evaluationTimeSeconds, List<OperationalMargin> margins, List<TripPrediction> tripPredictions, List<MitigationSuggestion> mitigationSuggestions)
      Creates a report.
      Parameters:
      timestampMillis - evaluation timestamp in milliseconds
      evaluationTimeSeconds - wall-clock evaluation time in seconds
      margins - ranked operating margins
      tripPredictions - trip predictions
      mitigationSuggestions - mitigation suggestions

      Returns the timestamp.

      timestamp in milliseconds

      Returns trip predictions.

      Returns the count of margins at or above warning level.

      warning or worse margin count

      public boolean hasHighUrgencyPrediction()
      Returns whether a high-urgency trip prediction exists.
      Returns:
      true when a high or imminent trip is predicted

      Returns:
      worst status mapped to envelope status
